# ocp_separation_pod (Resource)

Container for separating customer resources used by projects.
Defines which infrastructure and platform resources may be used together within projects assigned to it.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `customer_id` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `allow_shared_primary_cluster` (Boolean)
- `allow_shared_secondary_cluster` (Boolean)
- `data_protection_policy_ids` (Set of String)
- `dedicated_cluster_ids` (Set of String)
- `domain_ids` (Set of String)
- `network_ids` (Set of String)
- `note` (String)
- `os_distributions` (Set of String)
- `patching_window_ids` (Set of String)
- `solution` (String)
- `tier_ids` (Set of String)
- `workflow_ids` (Set of String)

### Read-Only

- `add_new_data_protection_policies` (Boolean)
- `add_new_dedicated_clusters` (Boolean)
- `add_new_domains` (Boolean)
- `add_new_networks` (Boolean)
- `add_new_os_distributions` (Boolean)
- `add_new_patching_windows` (Boolean)
- `add_new_tiers` (Boolean)
- `add_new_workflows` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
